'''machacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featureitis|featureitis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featureitis|featureitis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| machacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæchæchæth|mæchæchæth]] || [[word:mæchæchæj|mæchæchæj]] || [[word:mæchæchæsh|mæchæchæsh]] || [[word:mæchæchæ|mæchæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:machachachath|machachachath]] || [[word:machachachaj|machachachaj]] || [[word:machachachash|machachachash]] || [[word:machachacha|machachacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:machachath|machachath]] || [[word:machachaj|machachaj]] || [[word:machachash|machachash]] || [[word:machacha|machacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:machafchath|machafchath]] || [[word:machafchaj|machafchaj]] || [[word:machafchash|machafchash]] || [[word:machafchaf|machafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:machachatha|machachatha]] || [[word:machachaja|machachaja]] || [[word:machachasha|machachasha]] || [[word:machachaka|machachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:machachath|machachath]] || [[word:machachaj|machachaj]] || [[word:machachash|machachash]] || [[word:machacha|machacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:machachathal|machachathal]] || [[word:machachajal|machachajal]] || [[word:machachashal|machachashal]] || [[word:machachakal|machachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:machachathatha|machachathatha]] || [[word:machachajaja|machachajaja]] || [[word:machachashasha|machachashasha]] || [[word:machachaka|machachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:machachathan|machachathan]] || [[word:machachajan|machachajan]] || [[word:machachashan|machachashan]] || [[word:machachakan|machachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:machachathaoro|machachathaoro]] || [[word:machachajaoro|machachajaoro]] || [[word:machachashaoro|machachashaoro]] || [[word:machachakaoro|machachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
